title: Senior Teacher - SRM University - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - SRM University - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at SRM University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Ranchi-based team.

About SRM University:
SRM University is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SRM University!
